what_it_does: Defines a React-based thumbnail rendering layer for registry Type objects, dispatching by type layer, family, and runtime metadata to produce scaled visual previews for tokens, atoms, blocks, systems, surfaces, docs, and templates.
observations: Uses global React destructuring and global registries/renderers through window.CV_REGISTRY, window.WS_BLOCKS, window.WidgetRender, and window.WIZARD_KINDS.
Central dispatch happens in pickRenderer, with layer-specific renderer functions kept in the same file.
ScaledThumb provides a reusable wrapper for fitting native-size previews into a requested thumbnail box.
Several previews use mock data, placeholder chrome, or simplified miniature layouts rather than live documents.
Template thumbnails reuse the parent type thumbnail when an extended type can be resolved.
standouts: The file treats thumbnail generation as layer-aware visual interpretation rather than a single generic card.
It mixes actual runtime rendering for blocks/widgets with schematic renderers for wizard steps, slides, docs, tokens, and atoms.
It exports TypeThumb, ScaledThumb, RenderShape, and ThumbPlaceholder onto window.
conventions: Functional React components with inline style objects and className hooks.
Renderer names follow the layer/family pattern, such as TokenColorThumb, SurfaceWidgetThumb, and DocWizardThumb.
Fallback paths are present when expected globals or render functions are unavailable.
Preview data is embedded directly in this file for widget-related thumbnails.
Shape drawing is implemented with small inline SVG components.
concerns: The file relies on several globals without local guards beyond fallback rendering in some cases.
The TypeThumb memo dependency only tracks rawType.id, while it also reads rawType.lineage and rawType contents.
BlockThumb memo dependencies do not include def.defaults or type.defaults directly.
The runtimeKind variable in pickRenderer is declared but not used.
Some visible preview strings and symbols are hard-coded in the component layer.
notes: This file is the registry thumbnail interpreter: it turns typed design-system records into compact visual previews.
questions: Should runtime.kind influence renderer selection beyond the current family and layer checks?
Are the hard-coded mock widget document and wizard fallback steps intended to be shared thumbnail fixtures?
Should TypeThumb update when rawType changes without an id change?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose matches the implementation: it provides a universal, layer-aware thumbnail renderer for registry types and scales previews for card contexts.
apparent_themes: Compact previews of structured design artifacts
intention_signals: The file seems intended to make every registry type visually scannable by mapping metadata to representative miniature renderings while preserving actual render paths where available.
novelty: A single thumbnail registry interprets multiple design-system strata, from primitive tokens to document templates, using a mixture of live renderers, schematic UI miniatures, and SVG shape helpers.
contribution: This file contributes a neutral visual interpretation layer that a fused system would keep as the place where registry substrate metadata becomes previewable thumbnail UI across type layers.
summary_for_embedding: React thumbnail renderer for ConceptV registry Type objects with layer, family, runtime dispatch and scaled previews for tokens, atoms, blocks, systems, surfaces, docs, and templates.
intention_for_embedding: It was for turning abstract design-system registry entries into compact, representative visuals used across registry cards, workshop surfaces, templates, architecture views, and type-building contexts.

symbols.does: Scales a native-size child preview into a target thumbnail box.
symbols.description: This component computes a uniform scale from requested width and height against a native preview size, then absolutely positions the child content with a translate and scale transform. It supports top or centered vertical alignment, background override, and padding around the scaled content.

symbols.does: Resolves a raw type and renders the appropriate thumbnail for it.
symbols.description: This is the entry component for thumbnail rendering. It resolves registry references through window.CV_REGISTRY when needed, chooses a renderer through pickRenderer, wraps the output with layer-specific classes, and optionally overlays a context label.

symbols.does: Renders a generic placeholder thumbnail.
symbols.description: This component displays a muted image-stack icon and optional label inside the standard thumbnail shell. It is used when no type, renderer, global dependency, or block renderer is available.

symbols.does: Selects a thumbnail renderer based on type layer and family.
symbols.description: This function dispatches registry types to specific renderer components for token, atom, block, system, surface, doc, and template layers. It reads layer, family, and runtime kind, although runtime kind is not currently used in the branch logic.

symbols.does: Renders a color token as a filled swatch with hex and name text.
symbols.description: This component reads type.defaults.hex, falls back to a gold color, and chooses light or dark foreground text using isLightHex. It presents the token value and token name directly on the color field.

symbols.does: Renders a typography token preview.
symbols.description: This component uses type.defaults.family and type.defaults.weight to show a large Aa sample and small metadata. It falls back to sans-serif and weight 600 when defaults are absent.

symbols.does: Renders a shape token using its id suffix as the shape name.
symbols.description: This component extracts the last segment of type.id and passes it to RenderShape. It displays the rendered shape with the token name beneath it.

symbols.does: Renders a generic token thumbnail with an icon and name.
symbols.description: This fallback token renderer uses type.icon or a color-swatches icon and displays the type name. It covers token families without a specialized renderer.

symbols.does: Renders an icon atom inside a ring.
symbols.description: This component chooses an icon name from type.defaults.name, type.icon, or star and sizes it relative to the thumbnail dimensions. It uses CvIcon with a bronze tone inside a styled ring.

symbols.does: Renders a status atom preview as four status dots.
symbols.description: This component displays ok, warn, info, and err dot elements. It does not read type-specific defaults beyond receiving the standard thumbnail props.

symbols.does: Renders an atom shape preview.
symbols.description: This component reads type.defaults.shape, falls back to circle, and renders the shape through RenderShape. The shape size is proportional to the smaller thumbnail dimension.

symbols.does: Renders a stamp-like atom preview with uppercase text.
symbols.description: This component displays type.defaults.text or STAMP as uppercase text inside the stamp thumbnail style. It is used for atom family mark.

symbols.does: Renders a block thumbnail using window.WS_BLOCKS when available.
symbols.description: This component derives a block key from type.runtime.key or the type id suffix, looks up a block definition, and calls its render function with merged defaults. It wraps the live block output in ScaledThumb, with a placeholder fallback when no renderer exists.

symbols.does: Renders a system widget thumbnail with mock widget document data.
symbols.description: This component uses window.WidgetRender to render a dashboard widget preview for the system key derived from runtime metadata. It supplies MOCK_WIDGET_DOC with widgetKind dashboard and scales the result into the thumbnail.

symbols.does: Renders a generic system thumbnail showing slot labels and accepted layers.
symbols.description: This component enumerates type.slots and displays each slot label with accepted layer names. When there are no slots, it displays a No slots marker.

symbols.does: Renders a surface widget thumbnail in dashboard, hub, or embed context.
symbols.description: This component derives the widget kind from runtime metadata or type id, prepares mock widget data, and delegates framing to SurfaceWidgetFrame. It falls back to a placeholder when window.WidgetRender is unavailable.

symbols.does: Builds contextual frames for widget surface thumbnails.
symbols.description: This component renders different miniature environments for dashboard, hub, and embed widget kinds. It nests scaled WidgetRender output inside schematic surrounding chrome such as rails, topbars, lines, grids, and aside elements.

symbols.does: Renders a wizard-step surface thumbnail.
symbols.description: This component builds a small step frame with header, body, and footer controls. It determines the body kind from type.defaults.kind, type.runtime.key, or form, then delegates the interior to StepBodyPreview.

symbols.does: Renders schematic bodies for wizard step kinds.
symbols.description: This component switches on capture, choice, review, celebrate, and default form step kinds. Each branch returns a compact mock interaction layout such as drop zone, choices, review rows, completion state, or fields.

symbols.does: Renders a deck-slide surface thumbnail.
symbols.description: This component chooses a slide kind from defaults or runtime metadata and displays title, section, or content slide structures. It uses small placeholder lines and body shapes for content previews.

symbols.does: Renders a generic surface thumbnail with chrome and slot blocks.
symbols.description: This component displays a simple window-like chrome bar with the type name, followed by slot labels from type.slots. It is the surface fallback for families without specialized rendering.

symbols.does: Renders a document widget thumbnail by reusing SurfaceWidgetThumb as a dashboard.
symbols.description: This component adapts the incoming doc type into a surface widget type with runtime key dashboard. It delegates the actual preview to SurfaceWidgetThumb.

symbols.does: Renders a wizard document thumbnail with a step rail and stage.
symbols.description: This component chooses a brand shape from tags, resolves steps from defaults or window.WIZARD_KINDS, and falls back to five named steps. It renders a compact sidebar with step states and a schematic content area.

symbols.does: Renders a document deck thumbnail as a stack of mini slides.
symbols.description: This component creates four overlapping slide elements with different schematic content. The stack uses z-index and translate transforms to suggest multiple slides.

symbols.does: Renders a brochure document thumbnail as a single sheet layout.
symbols.description: This component draws a sheet with header marks, hero area, two text columns, and a call-to-action block. It is a schematic brochure preview rather than a live document render.

symbols.does: Renders a generic document thumbnail with icon, name, and family label.
symbols.description: This fallback document renderer shows a browser-style icon or type.icon, the type name, and a text label based on type.family. It is used for doc families without specialized handling.

symbols.does: Renders a template thumbnail using its parent type when available.
symbols.description: This component resolves type.extends through window.CV_REGISTRY.get and renders the parent thumbnail if found. It overlays a variables badge showing the count of type.variables, or falls back to DocGenericThumb when no parent is available.

symbols.does: Renders simple SVG shapes for shape previews.
symbols.description: This helper supports hexagon, octagon, diamond, and circle shapes using inline SVG. It uses CSS variables for stroke and fill and computes polygon points for multi-sided shapes.

symbols.does: Classifies a hex color as light or dark.
symbols.description: This helper expands short hex colors, parses RGB channels, and applies a weighted brightness calculation. It returns true for non-hex or bright colors and is used to choose text color in color token thumbnails.
